scripts.verify: python -m compileall -q tools && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" && node --check docs/assets/data.generated.js && node --check docs/assets/app.js && node --check docs/assets/state/app-state.js && node --check docs/assets/state/map-visual-state.js && node --check docs/assets/data/active-data.js && node --check docs/assets/data/derived-indices.js && node --check docs/assets/render/map-layers.js && python tools/verify_generated_outputs.py
